_note: Sheet-wide, always-on constellation stat bonuses only. Verified against genshin-db constellation text — almost every constellation is a talent-level increase, a mechanic change, or a conditional/talent-scoped buff (e.g. 'Charged Attack CRIT Rate +15%'), none of which map to a whole-sheet StatValue. Faruzan C6 is the rare clean case (her Anemo DMG is effectively all her damage). Do NOT add talent-scoped or conditional effects here — they would overstate the sheet.
